function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request because only one of the two referenced projects has a canonical project record. I found Dockflow Exception Radar in `40_projects/2026_04_25_dockflow_exception_radar/README.MD`, but I could not find a BlueMesa Quotebook project in `40_projects/`, so I cannot compare two project start dates or choose one to delete without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox workflow: treated inbox request as non-canonical, verified against canonical project lane, and avoided mutation when required canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: `99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md` and `00_inbox/AGENTS.MD` require canonical verification before action and to stop without mutation when support is missing. `40_projects/AGENTS.MD` defines project canon as each folder’s `README.MD`. Only Dockflow has such a record; BlueMesa Quotebook does not in the project lane.
